paper_package.contents: 00README.json, main.tex, bibliography/style, overview figure, and sixteen human-AI result figures; no code, prompts-as-executed configuration, protocol record, search rows, PDFs/parsed texts, eligibility labels, extracted statistics, effect-size rows, statistical routines, traces, generated report, or analysis environment
paper_package.availability_statement: The immutable v1 says data needed for replication will be made available through a dedicated public GitHub repository and AutoSynthesis will be released under an open-source license; it provides no repository URL.

methods: GitHub repository API searches for exact title, paper ID, and first author plus title
release_search.boundary: No author-linked official code, data, report, or run repository was found. This establishes absence from the immutable paper package and searched public surfaces at the audit time, not permanent nonexistence.

excluded_unofficial_repository.reason: Not author-owned or paper-linked. Although its README calls itself official, it contains placeholder clone/contact strings (your-username and author@example.com), gives the citation year as 2023, and was created after v1. It is not treated as source implementation evidence.
